mission: Reduce the remaining coefficient-side CP-odd frontier to its minimal boundary datum on the lowest-shell fermionic bridge sector.

conditions: restrict to the admitted lowest-shell fermionic bridge sector
require a gauge-neutral SO(3)-invariant bilinear datum
require oddness under chirality exchange / parity reversal on the bridge sector
theorem_1_minimal_cp_odd_bilinear.statement: Under the stated minimality conditions, the unique CP-odd boundary bilinear is the chiral imbalance operator Q5 = N_+ - N_-, equivalently a chiral chemical-potential datum mu5 conjugate to Q5.

theorem_2_current_stack_value.statement: On the current Hawking/KMS seed, no chirality selector is derived. The two chiral sectors remain symmetry-related, so the minimal CP-odd datum vanishes on the current stack.

imports.seed_boundary: The current extension does not derive a preferred chirality. Without a parity-odd or chiral selector theorem, the two horizon chiral sectors remain symmetry-related.

theorem_3_coefficient_boundary_reduction.statement: The remaining coefficient-side frontier does not consist of a generic CP-odd theorem. It reduces exactly to one minimal boundary pseudoscalar datum Q5 together with the CP-even magnitude selector (M1, m_tilde1).
remaining_objects: a CP-even magnitude selector theorem for (M1, m_tilde1)
a theorem deriving nonzero Q5, or equivalently nonzero mu5, on the boundary sector

final_boundary.status: derived / sharpened exhausted Paper 35 coefficient boundary
final_boundary.safe_statement: The coefficient-side CP-odd frontier is now reduced as far as the current stack permits. It is one missing pseudoscalar datum Q5, not a broad undefined CP sector.
